modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to edit reservation prior to pickup in Cheqroom.

full_description_text: I need to change my reservation before I pick it up. I’m not sure how to do this in Cheqroom. It seems like there’s no option to edit it easily.
short_description: Unable to edit reservation prior to pickup in Cheqroom.
description: I need to change my reservation before I pick it up. I’m not sure how to do this in Cheqroom. It seems like there’s no option to edit it easily.
